request: Select the right Bead to work on next when --robot-triage returns malformed output.

selected_bead.title: Stabilize graph traversal
selected_bead.reason: Selected after --robot-triage failed with malformed JSON. Fallback to --robot-insights identified bd-101 as ready with highest PageRank among unblocked candidates.

commands_used.why: Initial triage command attempted but returned malformed output.
Fallback command used when --robot-triage failed to get valid graph data.

rejected_candidates.reason: Lower PageRank than bd-101 and does not unblock other tasks.

caveats: --robot-triage returned malformed JSON; used --robot-insights as fallback
